description: Formal benchmark_v1 baseline model set. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.
selection_rules: Keep one stable default baseline as the historical reference point.
Keep one fog-focused baseline to represent weather-head-oriented adaptation.
Keep one video-adapted baseline to represent target-video specialization.
Append new baseline roles under a new benchmark version instead of silently replacing benchmark_v1 roles.

models.label: default_baseline
models.notes: Stable default unified model baseline used as the long-term historical reference.

models.label: fogfocus
models.notes: Fog-focused adaptation baseline representing weather-head-oriented specialization.

models.label: videoadapt
models.notes: Target-video adapted fog-head baseline representing deployment-specific specialization.

models.label: fogfocus_full
models.notes: Formal fog-focused training result intended to represent the current strongest unified formal reference.
